articles.title: Blood on bed, empty liquor bottles: Mystery deepens in Gurgaon techie's death at Mussoorie homestay
articles.description: A 27-year-old IT professional from Visakhapatnam was found dead in a Mussoorie homestay. Her father, a retired army man, has stated he does not suspect foul play, despite the mysterious circumstances. The police are awaiting the postmortem report to determine the cause of death.

articles.title: Late-night Delhi huddle: Eknath Shinde meets 6 Shiv Sena (UBT) MPs amid 'Operation Tiger' buzz
articles.description: Speculation of a Shiv Sena (UBT) split intensified after Eknath Shinde met with several MPs from Uddhav Thackeray's camp in Delhi. In response, Shiv Sena MP Arvind Sawant urged the Lok Sabha Speaker not to recognize any breakaway group or merger, citing parliamentary rules and the ongoing Supreme Court case.
articles.full_text: Speculation of a Shiv Sena (UBT) split intensified after Eknath Shinde met with several MPs from Uddhav Thackeray's camp in Delhi. In response, Shiv Sena MP Arvind Sawant urged the Lok Sabha Speaker not to recognize any breakaway group or merger, citing parliamentary rules and the ongoing Supreme Court case.

articles.title: Messi scripts history with first World Cup hat-trick, equals Klose's goals record
articles.description: Lionel Messi achieved a career milestone, scoring his first World Cup hat-trick to lead Argentina to a 3-0 win over Algeria. This remarkable feat drew him level with Miroslav Klose atop the tournament's all-time scoring charts with 16 goals. The performance also marked his 200th appearance for Argentina and extended his scoring streak to five consecutive World Cup matches.

articles.title: No nukes, Hormuz access and more: JD Vance outlines 3 pillars of US-Iran deal
articles.description: US Vice President JD Vance revealed a three-point peace framework with Iran: no nuclear weapons, open Strait of Hormuz, and strict conditions for economic benefits. Tehran must cease supporting militant groups and abandon its nuclear program to receive aid. Washington emphasizes actions over promises, stating the US benefits regardless of Iran's response.

articles.title: US military strikes another suspected drug-trafficking boat in eastern Pacific, 1 killed
articles.description: US forces have killed one suspected drug trafficker in a boat strike in the eastern Pacific, part of a broader anti-narcotics campaign. This incident marks at least 208 deaths since the Trump administration's operations began. Critics question the effectiveness and legality, citing land-based trafficking routes and limited evidence of 'narcoterrorist' claims, with a Pentagon review underway.

From passengers to parcels: Noida International Airport to see first cargo flight today
articles.description: Noida International Airport (NIA) is set to handle its first cargo flight, a domestic departure, just days after commencing passenger operations. This marks a significant step in its development as a key aviation and cargo hub for North India, boasting advanced digital infrastructure and substantial handling capacity designed for efficient operations.

articles.title: Gold, Silver Rate Today Live Updates: International gold prices rise marginally; all eyes on US Federal Reserve decision
Oil prices dip near $75 per barrel mark as Middle East turmoil cools
articles.description: Oil prices have significantly declined, nearing pre-conflict levels as hopes rise for a US-Iran agreement. This potential deal could reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial oil transit route, though full restoration of production may take considerable time. Concerns remain regarding the truce's durability and Iran's control over the strait.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: UGC NET June exam admit card 2026 released at ugcnet.nta.nic.in for June 22 to 30 exams: Check direct link to download hall tickets here
articles.description: The National Testing Agency has issued admit cards for the UGC NET June 2026 examination scheduled across six days later this month. Candidates can access their hall tickets online and are advised to verify all details carefully. The agency has also provided support channels for resolving admit card-related issues and urged aspirants to stay updated through the official website.

articles.title: IPU to conduct MEd counselling on June 18; Merit-based seat allotment on same day: Check details here
articles.description: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University will conduct the first offline counselling for M.Ed admissions on June 18 at its Dwarka campus. Qualified candidates will undergo document verification followed by merit-based seat allotment. Applicants must carry the prescribed fee and required certificates. Seats allotted during counselling can be withdrawn until June 25, while seat availability will be announced on the counselling day.

articles.title: SGPGI Nursing Officer admit card 2026 released at sgpgims.org.in: Direct link to download hall tickets here
articles.description: The SGPGI Nursing Officer recruitment process has entered its final stage with the release of the city intimation slip and the admit card expected shortly before the examination. Candidates scheduled to appear for the computer-based test between June 19 and 23 should verify their details carefully, follow official instructions, and stay updated through the institute’s website.

articles.title: Gujarat TAT HS result 2026 released at sebexam.org: Direct link to download here
articles.description: The Gujarat State Examination Board has announced the TAT-HS 2025 Preliminary Examination results after completing a transparent evaluation process that included OMR sheet publication and answer key objections. Of the 1.65 lakh registered candidates, 1.47 lakh appeared for the test. While 51,971 candidates scored above 70 marks, only 1,666 crossed the 120-mark threshold, highlighting the examination's competitive nature.
articles.full_text: The Gujarat State Examination Board has announced the TAT-HS 2025 Preliminary Examination results after completing a transparent evaluation process that included OMR sheet publication and answer key objections. Of the 1.65 lakh registered candidates, 1.47 lakh appeared for the test. While 51,971 candidates scored above 70 marks, only 1,666 crossed the 120-mark threshold, highlighting the examination's competitive nature.

articles.title: 'House of the Dragon Season 3' early reviews
articles.description: Early reviews hail 'House of the Dragon' Season 3 as its best yet, praising its thrilling action, stunning visuals, and compelling characters. Critics highlight significant improvements in cinematography and special effects, particularly in dragon sequences. Emma D'Arcy's performance as Rhaenyra Targaryen is singled out for exceptional acclaim, balancing madness with ambition as the Dance of the Dragons looms.

articles.title: Shammy Thilakan joins 'Chiyaan 63'
articles.description: Actor Shammy Thilakan joins Vikram in 'Chiyaan 63', marking their reunion after decades. Their bond, rekindled on set, echoes their past collaborations in Malayalam cinema. This highly anticipated Tamil film, directed by Anand Shankar, also boasts a strong supporting cast, promising an exciting cinematic experience for fans.

articles.title: Jelly Roll says weight loss changed everything
articles.description: At 41, country star Jelly Roll has embarked on an incredible journey, losing 300 pounds and emerging as a 'whole different human.' This remarkable change has positively influenced his role as a father and his physical health. However, this personal renaissance unfolds against a backdrop of challenges, including his reported divorce from Bunnie Xo, alongside their aspirations for IVF.
